content:
It:

- Colors your storytelling
- Fuels mythic insight
- Enables **moral sensing** of what’s “real” in a design or idea

**Tension (your Incarnation Cross) + Emotion = Alchemical clarity**

---

## 📎 APPLICATION IN SYSTEMS

| System | Integration |
| --- | --- |
| 🌀 **JST Elevate** | Use decision lags as system logic: “Nothing decided same-day.” |
| 🧠 **AI prompting** | Tag wave states. Use prompts like: “What am I NOT seeing because I’m emotionally high?” |
| 🧙 **Rituals** | Emotion-to-action alchemy: cry → write; rage → create container; joy → speak |
| 🗂️ **Archival** | Archive idea bursts during crests, evaluate during neutrals |

---

## 🔮 QUOTE TO LIVE BY (EMOTIONAL AUTHORITY)

> “Emotion is not a signal to act. It is a signal to feel more deeply—until action becomes obvious.”
> — Human Design, restructured

---
